title: Fishing Plus
description: A Fishing Datapack, Aim to add lot of Item, mobs, ranks, leaderboard, and lot of fun!!
body:
# Fishing Data Pack

**Embark on the ultimate fishing odyssey with the Fishing Frenzy Data Pack!**  

This data pack offers an immersive experience filled with treasures, challenges, and surprises:  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kAysOkYEn-E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### **Key Features**  
- **Overpowered Loot**: Find unique items with custom ranks and abilities.  
- **Fishing Leaderboard**: Track and compete with friends to see who's the best angler.  
- **Custom Fishing Mobs**: Encounter exclusive aquatic creatures while reeling in treasures.  
- **Fun Mechanics**: Discover Easter items, magical rewards, and hidden secrets as you level up.  

---

### **Item Ranks**  
Items you fish up are sorted into these ranks, each with a distinct color and rarity:  
1. **Common** - Basic everyday items. *(Color: Grey)*  
2. **Uncommon** - Slightly better finds. *(Color: White)*  
3. **Rare** - More valuable rewards. *(Color: Green)*  
4. **Epic** - Remarkable and exciting catches. *(Color: Blue)*  
5. **Ultimate** - Prestigious and powerful treasures. *(Color: Yellow)*  
6. **Legendary** - Iconic items of lore. *(Color: Orange)*  
7. **Mythical** - Treasures of mythic proportions. *(Color: Red)*  
8. **Special** - Incredibly rare and valuable. *(Color: Dark Red)*  
9. **Exclusive** - The absolute pinnacle of loot. *(Color: Purple)*  

> **Tip**: Download the **Fishing Frenzy Resource Pack** to unlock stunning visuals and rank colors for your loot! [Download Rank Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ranks-fishing-datapack/)

---

### **Player Fishing Ranks**  
Progress through fishing levels to unlock new titles and rewards:  
- **Novice** (Level 100) - Just starting out.  
- **Adept** (Level 300) - Gaining expertise.  
- **Expert** (Level 500) - A seasoned angler.  
- **Master** (Level 1000) - A true fishing master.  
- **Legend** (Level 4000) - Among the best of all time.  
- **Hidden Special Rank** (Level 100,000) - A title of unparalleled mystery and prestige.  

---

### **Magical Items**  
Level up your fishing skill to unlock **Magical Items**, only available to dedicated fishers! The higher your level, the better your chances to reel in these powerful treasures.  

---

### **Easter Items**  
Discover **Easter-themed treasures** with an ultra-rare *0.001% drop chance*. Seek out the mysterious **Unknown Item** for the ultimate bragging rights!  

---

### **Start Your Adventure**  
With epic loot, competitive ranks, and exciting discoveries, the Fishing Frenzy Data Pack is your gateway to a world of fishing like never before. Cast your line, rise through the ranks, and claim your treasures!  

> Ready to begin? Don’t forget to grab the **Fishing Rank Resource Pack** for the full experience! [Download Rank Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ranks-fishing-datapack/)
